name: Shōji |Unpopular actor|
description:
"Shōji Hanzō, the struggling actor and wannabe celebrity, is ready to make a big impression!"

TRIVIA

Shō means "prosper\bright" (shōji wants to prosper as an actor and shine bright amongst the crowd)

Hānzo meaning "to hide" (often hides his true emotions and insincere about his actions and thoughts)
creator: MyDearest_N@oko
